queries.question: What frequent flyer lounges have complementary Wi-Fi and what VIP lounges also offer it?
queries.sql:
SELECT Frequent_Flyer_Lounges.name
FROM Frequent_Flyer_Lounges
WHERE Frequent_Flyer_Lounges.Amenities = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"
UNION
SELECT VIP_Lounges.name
FROM VIP_Lounges
WHERE VIP_Lounges.Amenities = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"

queries.question: Show frequent flyer lounges and VIP lounges with complementary Wi-Fi.
queries.sql:
SELECT Frequent_Flyer_Lounges.name
FROM Frequent_Flyer_Lounges
UNION
SELECT VIP_Lounges.name
FROM VIP_Lounges
WHERE VIP_Lounges.Amenities = "Complimentary Wi-Fi"
